messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Create a small library with one function and a unit test.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Create a small library with one function and a unit test.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "define-requirements",
      "title": "Define function API and requirements",
      "description": "Specify the library purpose, the single function name, inputs, outputs, edge cases, and target runtime (e.g., Node 14+ or browser).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A short spec document or README section exists that states the function name, parameter types, return type, example usage, and defined edge cases."
    },
    {
      "id": "init-repo",
      "title": "Initialize repository and development environment",
      "description": "Create project directory, initialize git, create package config (package.json or pyproject), set up linter and test runner, and create initial README and .gitignore.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "define-requirements"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Repository has been initialized with a commit, package config present, test runner installed and configured, and basic README and .gitignore files added."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-function",
      "title": "Implement the single function",
      "description": "Write the source file containing the function implementation according to the spec, include input validation and appropriate error handling, and export the function from the library.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-repo"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Source file contains the implemented function matching the spec, passes linting, and is exported so tests can import it."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-unit-test",
      "title": "Write unit test(s) for the function",
      "description": "Create unit test file(s) covering normal cases, boundary cases, and error cases using the chosen test framework; keep tests deterministic and fast.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-function",
        "init-repo"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Test file(s) exist and cover the main success path plus at least two edge/error cases with clear assertions."
    },
    {
      "id": "run-tests-and-fix",
      "title": "Run test suite and fix issues",
      "description": "Execute the test runner, address failing tests or lint errors, iterate until all tests pass and CI-local checks succeed.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "write-unit-test",
        "implement-function"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "All tests pass locally (exit code 0), linting passes, and any discovered bugs are fixed and committed."
    },
    {
      "id": "document-and-release",
      "title": "Add usage docs and prepare release",
      "description": "Add examples to README, update version in package config, tag a release commit, and prepare minimal publishing steps or distribution files.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "run-tests-and-fix"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README contains usage examples, repository contains a versioned tag or release commit, and instructions for installation or publishing are present."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 6,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down software development: start by defining the API, prepare the repository and tools, implement the function, create tests, run and fix tests, then finalize documentation and release steps."
}
